Test Case Title: Verify redirection to PIM page after clicking on PIM button

Test Case Title: Verify that PIM button is visible in the left sidebar after successful login

Expected Result: PIM button is visible and displayed correctly in the left sidebar menu

Test Case Title: Verify adding a new employee successfully when providing valid data in all mandatory fields
Pre-conditions: user is on add employee page
Test Steps:
1- enter valid data in all mandatory fields
2- click save button
Test Data:
first name: omar
middle name: ahmed
last name: sayed
employee id: 47589
Expected Result: the employee is saved successfully, and the system automatically redirects to the 'Personal Details' tab of the new employee

Test Case Title: Verify adding a new employee when creating login details and providing valid data in all fields

Test Steps:

2. enter valid username.
3. keep 'Status' selected as 'Enabled'.
4. enter a strong password and match it in 'Confirm Password'.
5. click Save.
Test Data:

password: test@1234
confirm password: test@1234
Expected Result: the employee and their login account are created successfully with active access permissions.

Test Case Title: Verify successfully creating an employee with Disabled login credentials
Pre-conditions: valid data is entered in first name, middle name, last name and id employee fields
Test Steps:
1. toggle 'Create Login Details' to ON.
2. enter valid username.
3. select 'Disabled' status radio button.
4. enter a strong password and match it in 'Confirm Password'.
5. click Save.
Test Data:
username: abo el sayed
password: test@1234
confirm password: test@1234
Expected Result: The account is saved successfully, but the login status it marked as Disabled, meaning the user won't be able to log in.
